name: Acuity Scheduling
description: Drive Acuity Scheduling (Squarespace-owned booking SaaS) from any AI agent: appointments, availability, appointment types, calendars, clients, products. 12 tools, Basic-auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Acuity Scheduling API v1 (developers.acuityscheduling.com).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to Acuity → **Integrations → API**.
2. Note your **User ID** and copy the **API Key**.
3. Set:
   - `ACUITY_USER_ID` = numeric user ID (e.g. `12345`)
   - `ACUITY_API_KEY` = the API key

**Authentication**: HTTP Basic with username=USER_ID and password=API_KEY.

**Availability flow**:
  1. List appointment types (`acuity_list_appointment_types`) — get appointmentTypeID.
  2. List calendars (`acuity_list_calendars`) — get calendarID(s).
  3. List available dates (`acuity_list_available_dates`) for date+appointmentType+calendar.
  4. List available times (`acuity_list_available_times`) for a specific date.
  5. Book the appointment (`acuity_create_appointment`).

**Cancellation**: appointments can be canceled (POST /appointments/{id}/cancel) — irreversible but client can rebook.

**Timezones**: Acuity normalizes everything to the appointment's calendar timezone. Dates use ISO 8601 with offset.

**Forms and custom fields**: appointments can have forms with custom fields — pass an array of {id, value} in `fields`.

**Rate limits**: ~10 req/sec. On 429 back off.

**Out of scope here**: products/packages purchases beyond list, certificates, email templates, scheduling-page customization.

tools.name: acuity_get_me
tools.description: Return account info: name, email, country, timezone. Health check.

tools.name: acuity_list_appointment_types
tools.description: List appointment types defined in the account. Each has id, name, duration, price, color, calendarIDs[], active.

tools.name: acuity_list_calendars
tools.description: List calendars (staff/resources). Each has id, name, email, location, description, timezone.

tools.name: acuity_list_available_dates
tools.description: List dates with available slots in a month, for a given appointmentTypeID and optional calendarID.

calendarID.description: Optional calendar ID — limit to this staff/resource.

timezone.description: TZ database name (e.g. 'America/New_York'). Default uses account's.

tools.name: acuity_list_available_times
tools.description: List specific time slots for a date.

canceled.description: If true, only canceled. Default excludes canceled.

tools.name: acuity_get_appointment
tools.description: Fetch a single appointment with client + forms + payment details.

tools.name: acuity_create_appointment
tools.description: Book an appointment. Required: datetime + appointmentTypeID + firstName + lastName + email.

noEmail.description: If true, skip the confirmation email.

tools.name: acuity_reschedule_appointment
tools.description: Move an appointment to a new datetime/calendar.

noEmail.description: If true, skip the cancellation email.

tools.name: acuity_list_clients
tools.description: List clients (people who have booked). Search by name or email.

tools.name: acuity_list_forms
tools.description: List intake forms (custom forms). Each has id, name, fields[]. Use field IDs in appointment create's `fields` param.
